name: The Borrowed Hours
specialty: Specializing in infiltration and extraction, The Borrowed Hours are known for their exceptional ability to slip through rifts unnoticed and complete missions without leaving a trace.

members.name: Aria Nightshade
members.note: Aria, a ruthless and calculating strategist, wears a silver eyepatch over her left eye, a reminder of a failed mission that left her blind in that eye.

members.name: Thorne Ironfang
members.note: Thorne's thick, curled beard hides a small, intricate silver tattoo that marks him as an initiate of the Obsidian Lotus.

members.name: Zephyr Windwhisper
members.note: Zephyr, a master of the arcane, is easily recognized by the large, feathered cloak that billows behind him as he moves through the Undercity.

members.name: Reaver Grimstone
members.note: Reaver, the group's enforcer, has a distinct scar running down the left side of his face, earned in a brutal bar brawl that left him without a permanent home.

visual: Clad in black leather armor and hooded cloaks, they move through the Undercity as a shadowy collective, their weapons hidden under their cloaks. A small, glowing obsidian symbol on their left wrists serves as their identifying mark.
reputation_note: Whispers in the Undercity speak of a crew that works for the Obsidian Lotus, completing missions others dare not touch. But be warned, they do not take kindly to those who cross them.
history: [2026-03-15] Completed a inter-guild-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+2/5)
